# MELBET Bahrain

Site: https://melbet-bahrain.com/
Default language: Arabic (`ar`)
Alternate language: English (`en`) via `?lang=en`

Public pages:
- / : Homepage covering sports, casino, offers, and support navigation.
- /partnership : Partnership page describing partner and agent routes.
- /faq : FAQ page for player and partnership questions.

English variants:
- /?lang=en
- /partnership?lang=en
- /faq?lang=en
